sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10671" key="a)nti/fragma" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντίφραγμα</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ατος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n10671.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">counter-fence, bulwark,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρός τι</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.558d</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
